items.visual_description: A black, short-sleeved, oversized t-shirt with a crewneck collar. It features a large graphic print on the front of an anime-style girl with teal hair and pink eyes, winking while eating a bar of chocolate. The brand tag 'SHARK SHIRTS' is visible on the inside collar.

overall_description: This is a black oversized t-shirt featuring a prominent, colorful anime-style graphic on the chest. The graphic depicts a girl with short teal hair, winking and blushing while eating a bar of chocolate. The t-shirt has a classic crewneck and short sleeves, presented flat against a white background.
